profile.name: Haomiao Jiang
profile.availability: Building at the intersection of pixels, geometry, and intelligent systems.
profile.intro: I work across computer vision, 3D systems, and generative AI, with roots in visual perception research and a bias toward useful tools.

research.title: Research
research.description: My public research profile is centered on how machines perceive, reconstruct, and generate visual worlds.

interests.name: Computer Vision
interests.detail: Perception, image understanding, and visual systems.

interests.name: Generative AI
interests.detail: Models and tools for creating structured visual content.

about.title: About
about.statement: Engineer by practice, researcher by training, and a persistent builder of small tools that make difficult ideas tangible.
